rulings.Case Title: CORNELIUS MURPHY et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel The Depositions Of Defendant San Bruno Lumber Company, Inc.'S Person Most Knowledgeable And Custodian Of Records And Request For Production Of Documents
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS DISCOVERY CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, MAY 31, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:00 A.M., LINE 1, PLAINTIFFS CORNELIUS MURPHY, FRANCES MURPHY, CORNELIUS MURPHY, THERESA MURPHY, COLLEEN CHASE, SHEILA BASS Motion To Compel The Depositions Of Defendant San Bruno Lumber Company, Inc.'s Person Most Knowledgeable And Custodian Of Records And Request For Production Of Documents. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel the depositions of defendant San Bruno Lumber Co.¿s person most knowledgeable and custodian of records and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition filed. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT BERNAL SR. et al VS. ALTA BUILDING MATERIALS COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSE TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, May 31, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Borg-Warner Corporation¿s motion to compel further responses to request, demand inspection, production of documents is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (220/HEK)
